main.description: Knowledge gained during a run rather than something possessed: a map region revealed, a codex or bestiary entry, a recipe learned. For use in a play record's `state` array. Cardinality: keyed — unique per ($type, id); writers upsert by `id`.

id.description: Stable, game-defined identifier for this discovery. Language-independent and consistent across play-throughs & game versions.

name.description: Human-readable display name in the locale active at write time. Optional, but recommended so renderers without a localised mapping of `id` can fall back to displaying this.

discoveredAt.description: Wall-clock time the discovery was made.

items.description: Game-specific lexicons that can hold additional information about this discovery.
